caption: A person with short blonde hair wearing a cream-colored turtleneck sweater sits at a white table in a room with a red light strip along the wall. In the background, several other people are seated at similar tables, some wearing grey and dark clothing. The person in the foreground holds a small orange object in their right hand, bringing it toward their mouth. As the sequence progresses, they move their hand and arm, eventually leaning back slightly in their chair. Black bags are visible on the table in front of them. The setting appears to be a common room or classroom with neutral-colored walls and several black chairs. The lighting is a mix of bright overhead fixtures and the ambient red glow from the wall. No on-screen text or logos are visible.
